name: Rhubarb Pudding with Strawberries (Cancer)
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
Cut rhubarb stalks into 2-inch pieces. Place in saucepan with 3/4 cup sugar and 3/4 cup orange juice. Simmer over low heat for 15-20 minutes or until tender.
Prepare crumb topping by crushing graham crackers, mixing with 2 tablespoons sugar and melted butter. Press into bottom of a 9-inch pie plate and chill.
When rhubarb is nearly cooked, add remaining orange juice to bowl. Sprinkle gelatin over juice. Let soak for a few minutes.
Turn cooked rhubarb in food processor and puree. Return to saucepan and bring to simmer. Pour over gelatin and stir until gelatin is completely dissolved. Let cool slightly, then mix in cream. Chill several hours or overnight.
Before serving, hull and halve the strawberries. Arrange over top of rhubarb.
Summer fruits combine to make a fresh and piquant pudding similar to a cheesecake.
